plssem 0.1.2
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Categorical Models with plssem
    • Higher Order Models
    • Interaction Models with plssem
    • Linear Models with plssem
    • Handling Missing Values with plssem
    • Multilevel Models with plssem
    • Ordinal Regression with plssem
    • Parallel Bootstrapping with plssem

Retrieve bootstrap coefficient matrix

Source: R/model_generics.R
boot.Rd

Retrieve bootstrap coefficient matrix

boot(object)

# S4 method for class 'PlsModel'
boot(object)

Arguments

object

A fitted model object.

Value

A PlsSemMatrix of bootstrap replicate parameter vectors (rows = replicates, cols = parameters).

Examples

library(modsem)
#> This is modsem (1.0.19). Please report any bugs!
#> 
#> Attaching package: ‘modsem’
#> The following object is masked from ‘package:plssem’:
#> 
#>     parameter_estimates
library(plssem)

m <- "
  X =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  Z =~ z1 + z2 + z3
  Y =~ y1 + y2 + y3
  Y ~ X + Z + X:Z
"

fit <- pls(m, oneInt, bootstrap = TRUE, boot.R = 50)
boot(fit)
#>     X=~x1  X=~x2  X=~x3  Z=~z1  Z=~z2  Z=~z3  Y=~y1  Y=~y2  Y=~y3    Y~X    Y~Z
#> 1   0.931  0.912  0.883  0.901  0.933  0.910  0.958  0.950  0.971  0.438  0.337
#> 2   0.911  0.912  0.904  0.895  0.913  0.930  0.964  0.965  0.963  0.435  0.382
#> 3   0.920  0.909  0.913  0.907  0.914  0.920  0.966  0.971  0.958  0.441  0.375
#> 4   0.922  0.932  0.867  0.888  0.936  0.912  0.964  0.963  0.958  0.411  0.368
#> 5   0.929  0.884  0.912  0.900  0.897  0.925  0.970  0.962  0.956  0.436  0.342
#> 6   0.938  0.896  0.892  0.901  0.891  0.922  0.952  0.957  0.963  0.444  0.335
#> 7   0.932  0.893  0.913  0.891  0.916  0.922  0.969  0.965  0.951  0.414  0.396
#> 8   0.934  0.912  0.917  0.899  0.929  0.913  0.979  0.956  0.958  0.388  0.360
#> 9   0.945  0.911  0.891  0.871  0.955  0.904  0.969  0.944  0.977  0.457  0.349
#> 10  0.912  0.897  0.920  0.915  0.921  0.905  0.958  0.965  0.964  0.433  0.361
#> 11  0.928  0.909  0.897  0.885  0.932  0.910  0.964  0.974  0.948  0.442  0.359
#> 12  0.932  0.919  0.886  0.916  0.900  0.915  0.969  0.958  0.959  0.427  0.358
#> 13  0.945  0.917  0.879  0.913  0.909  0.936  0.965  0.958  0.967  0.425  0.356
